chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-189 of 2019 Const. Petition No.D-191 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 678/2019 3.For hearing of CMA 9583/17 4.For hearing of main case 07-08-2024 Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Associate of Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for petitioners in both matters. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, D.A.G. ***** Learned counsel for petitioners, upon instructions, does not press both these petitions, which are accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s). Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
